title: crotalaria eremaea
intro: Crotalaria eremaea, also known as Emu Bush or Desert Crotalaria, is a flowering plant native to the deserts of Western Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Emu Bush has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, soothing skin conditions, and aiding in wound healing. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria eremaea typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves or flowers, which can be used topically or ingested under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
